title: Iran’s New Supreme Leader Was Wounded Early in the War, Iranian and Israeli Officials Say
summary_full: Officials say Mojtaba Khamenei’s legs were hurt, but the circumstances as well as the extent of his injuries were unclear. He has remained out of view since being announced as leader three days ago.
summary_public: Officials say Mojtaba Khamenei’s legs were hurt, but the circumstances as well as the extent of his injuries were unclear. He has remained out of view since being announced as leader three days ago.

IR.label: neutral
